description_long: This is a two-story suburban house partially obscured by large, leafy trees in the front yard. The house features a complex, multi-gabled roof with gray shingles and several dormer windows, giving it a traditional yet elegant appearance. The exterior walls are clad in a combination of light-colored siding and brickwork, with a prominent front porch supported by columns. Multiple windows of varying sizes are symmetrically arranged on the facade, and the entryway is accentuated by a set of steps and decorative shrubbery. The surrounding trees provide ample shade and privacy, with dense foliage that nearly envelops the house from certain angles. The overall setting suggests a comfortable, family-oriented residence in a leafy neighborhood.
description: A two-story suburban house with a multi-gabled roof, brick and siding exterior, and a prominent front porch, partially hidden by large, leafy trees.
description_view_0: The front of the house is visible, showing the main entryway, porch, and symmetrical windows, with two large trees dominating the foreground.
description_view_1: The left side of the house is partially visible, with the trees obscuring much of the structure and only a portion of the roof and windows peeking through.
description_view_2: The rear of the house is almost completely hidden by dense tree foliage, with only the tree trunks and leaves visible.
description_view_3: The right side of the house is mostly covered by trees, but a small section of the house and roof can be glimpsed through the leaves.
attribute_entryway_design: Central front door with steps, covered porch supported by columns, and decorative shrubbery.
